slices.title: Notifications and cascade flows
slices.notes: Audited notifications/cascade surfaces. Fixed program diff + bundle cascades to join through event_people before notifying affectedPersonIds; added regression coverage; commit c85d2e4.

slices.title: RBAC and navigation entrypoints
slices.notes: Audited RBAC/navigation entrypoints. Locked feature-flags reads/page to Super Admin and filtered desktop/tablet sidebar items by role so Ops no longer see privileged admin routes; added regression coverage; commit 7939f65.

slices.title: Event isolation and cross-event leakage
slices.notes: Audited event-isolation surfaces. Fixed the public registration success flow so it resolves the event from the route slug and scopes registration lookup by eventId + registrationId, preventing cross-event confirmation/QR leakage; added regression coverage; commit f4bed9f.

slices.title: People merge and change history
slices.notes: Audited people merge/history. Fixed mergePeople so Event Coordinators cannot merge people whose linked records touch unassigned events; added regression coverage for the unauthorized cross-event merge path and revalidated people merge/history suites; commit ad3f720.

slices.title: Public program visibility and published snapshots
slices.notes: Audited public program visibility against PKT-A-006. Fixed the public /e/[eventSlug]/program route so completed/cancelled/archived events with historical program snapshots now return notFound instead of rendering stale public schedules; added route-level regression coverage; commit 708b341.

slices.title: Reports and export correctness
slices.notes: Audited reports/export correctness. Fixed getAttendanceReportData so by-session attendance joins scope sessions by eventId before reading session metadata, preventing foreign event session titles/times from leaking into an event report; added regression coverage; commit 6f5d90c.

slices.title: Travel accommodation transport flags and audit logs
slices.notes: Audited logistics server actions. Fixed accommodation, transport, resend-notification, and red-flag mutation actions so Event Coordinators can no longer read or mutate Ops-only logistics surfaces; added regression coverage; commit 2b5fe6e.
